title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 19 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 19 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 19 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/05/2022
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate by 0.18% in a day. The spot quotation in the morning almost keptsteady. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
